question: A static site is a website where the content is _______________ and served as-is to the user.
Static sites are typically faster and more _______________ than dynamic websites.
The entire static site is pre-built and stored as HTML, CSS, and _______________ files.
Cloudflare Pages allows you to host your static sites for _______________.
Cloudflare Pages automatically deploys your site whenever you push changes to your _______________ repository.
Cloudflare Pages serves your static site from its global _______________.
Cloudflare Pages provides free _______________ support, so your site can be served securely.
The free Cloudflare Pages plan has a monthly _______________ limit of 100GB.
The free Cloudflare Pages plan comes with a monthly _______________ limit of 500 minutes.
For the free Cloudflare Pages plan, your static site must be in a _______________ repository on GitHub or GitLab.
During project configuration, Cloudflare Pages will try to automatically detect the type of _______________ your site is built with.
If deployment fails due to code issues, you can fix them and then manually _______________ the deployment.
_______________ is a fast and modern static site generator written in Go.
_______________ is a popular static site generator written in Ruby, often used for blogs.
Netlify's free plan comes with 300 _______________ per month.
GitHub Pages is a free static site hosting service provided by _______________.
AWS offers a combination of S3 (Simple Storage Service) and _______________ (Content Delivery Network) for hosting static sites.
_______________ is a technique where the server generates the HTML pages before sending them to the client's browser.
A _______________ is a network of servers distributed across multiple locations to deliver content and reduce latency.
Cloudflare Pages is an excellent choice for developers and website owners looking to deploy their projects quickly and _______________.
